_comment: Data row has 34 fields against the combined 35-column header for month 2027-02 (7 worker columns + 28 day columns, one dNN cell missing) -- this is a FILE-LEVEL framing problem, not a per-row one: parseWorkforceCsv() throws WorkforceCsvRowShapeError synchronously, before WorkforceImportService.importCsv ever creates an ImportTask or enters the per-row loop. Shape is deliberately different from the failedRows-array fixtures above.
call: parseWorkforceCsv(csvText, month) -- throws before importCsv's per-row loop is reached
